name: vendor-compare
description: Evaluating 4 CRM tools and drowning in feature comparison tabs? Give it the vendors and your requirements, get back a structured comparison matrix with scoring, pros/cons, pricing analysis, and a clear recommendation with reasoning. The kind of analysis a consultant would charge $2K for.
tagline: Compare vendors objectively, decide in minutes

skills.name: compare
skills.description: Generate a structured vendor comparison report

setupTime: Requires Brave Search MCP server configured
outputDescription: A scored comparison matrix, per-vendor profiles with pricing breakdowns and gotchas, true cost analysis, migration risks, and a ranked recommendation.
